---
title: "Facial dimorphism in autistic quotient scores"
authors: "Scott, N., Jones, A. L., Kramer, R., & Ward, R."
year: 2015
date: 2015-01-01
pub-journal: "Clinical Psychological Science"
volume: "3(2)"
pages: "230–241"
doi: "10.1177/2167702614534238"
pdf: "assets/papers/2015/scott_etal_2015.pdf"
categories: [morphometrics]
---
